cn.description:
Transform Your iPhone into a Professional Long Exposure Camera with Even Longer

Unleash your creativity and capture stunning long exposure photos right from your iPhone with Even Longer. Whether you’re a professional photographer or an enthusiastic amateur, this app offers four incredible capture modes to elevate your photography:

Capture Modes:

	•	Frame Averaging Mode: Create beautiful motion blur with ease.
	•	Light Trails Mode: Perfect for capturing dynamic light movements.
	•	Star Trails Mode: Achieve unmatched quality in star trails photography with advanced algorithms that reduce disturbances like airplanes.
	•	Night Mode (PRO members only): Experience shutter speeds up to 30 times longer than any other third-party camera app, reaching up to 30 seconds (or 10 seconds on older devices).

Go PRO for Even More Features:

Unlock the full potential of Even Longer with our optional PRO membership, which includes:
	•	RAW Support: Available for all modes (except some ultra-wide cameras).
	•	Intervalometer: Capture time-lapse sequences with precision.
	•	Parallel Bracketing: Achieve perfect long exposures with multiple shots.
	•	Save Interim Results: Choose the best shot from multiple captures.
	•	Lossless TIFF Support: Preserve the highest quality in your photos.
	•	Exclusive Night Mode: Push the limits of your night photography.

Even Longer allows for a total capture time of up to 24 hours, giving you the flexibility to capture every moment, from seconds to hours. For the best results, use a tripod to ensure your long exposure images are sharp and stunning. If you’re exploring intentional camera movement (ICM) photography, you can experiment without a tripod for creative effects.

Get Started Today:
Transform your iPhone into a powerful long exposure camera and elevate your photography with Even Longer. Set your capture time from 1 second to several hours and see the difference.

Download Even Longer now and start capturing the world in a whole new light!

cn.description:
墨墨记忆卡 可以帮助你科学高效地规划需要记忆的知识，对抗遗忘。

- 可以把知识编辑成卡片，目前支持文字、图片、声音。

- 可以把知识卡片加入记忆规划，墨墨记忆卡 会为你安排合适的时间进行复习。

- 可以查看自己的记忆数据：遗忘曲线、记忆持久度、每日学习情况。

- 可以每日签到，见证自己的坚持和成长。

—遊戲介紹—

以《洛克人 X》系列為主軸，展現新世界觀「if」的《ROCKMAN X DiVE》將以離線版重新登場！
盡情體驗系列為人所知的橫向捲軸遊戲吧！

《洛克人 X》系列的遊戲資料保存於名為「深層紀錄檔」的電腦世界。
某天在深層記錄檔的世界中突然發生了原因不明的錯誤，導致「洛克人X」的遊戲資料發生異常。
操作「艾克斯」與「傑洛」等傳說中的英雄，挑戰非正規資料，修復遊戲資料吧！

■如實呈現洛克人各種動作
衝刺、跳躍、手砲、光劍——《洛克人X》的升種正宗動作將完全於遊戲重現！
另外更有本作特有的360度射擊和自動瞄準！
按鈕的大小與位置亦可按需要自行調整！

■超過100名《洛克人》歷代角色登場
收集自己喜愛的《洛克人》角色，再加以育成吧！
不論是記憶中的歷代角色，還是原創角色，都將以全新面貌登場！

■豐富遊戲內容！多達數百個關卡和原創故事
遊玩《ROCKMAN X DiVE》的原創故事，和新的洛克人相遇吧。
關卡各個難度合計共數百個，內容豐富，在其中盡情體驗洛克人的動作吧！

■以武器、晶片和卡片強化角色
武器可以任意和所有角色搭配，再加以強化！
升星後會解放技能，可強化內容也會變多！
卡片設計以原作插圖為基礎，不論強化或收集都樂趣無窮！

hk.description:
注意：
購買或使用前，請先確認「購買須知」及「支援機種須知」。

—遊戲介紹—

戴上律師徽章，為蒙上冤罪的委託人伸冤吧！
由律師成步堂龍一擔任主角的三部人氣作品現將合而為一！

本精選集將收錄逆轉裁判系列原點的成步堂三部曲：
《逆轉裁判 復甦的逆轉》、《逆轉裁判2》和《逆轉裁判3》3作共14話，內容豐富！

高解像度畫像，讓你能體驗更華麗、更逼真的法庭戰鬥！

除日文和英文，更對應法文、德文、中文（繁體字/簡體字）和韓文！

於選項切換語言，就能以不同語言遊玩《逆轉裁判123》。

3部作品的共用存檔欄位增加至10個！每個語言可分別保存10個存檔！

遊戲概覽：
發生殺人事件了！揭露事件真相，幫助清白的委託人吧！

—偵探部分
收集和事件相關的「情報」和「證物」！

—法廷部分
揭穿「檢察官」和「證人」的謊言，釐清事件真相吧！

真相只有一個！你要指出證供的矛盾之處，證明委託人無罪！

注意：
對話時長按對話按鈕可加快對話速度。
本遊戲故事和以往發售之家用遊戲機版相同。

購買須知：
本應用程式一經售出，恕不接受基於任何理由的退款申請（包括更換至其他商品或服務）。

　我們未能保證程式於非支援機種能如常運作，亦未能提供退款，敬請原諒。）

【暢玩更多CAPCOM遊戲吧！】
在App Store輸入「CAPCOM」或應用程式名稱搜尋吧！

移植動作遊戲經典名作「洛克人X」,按照原作添加新要素
充分利用各式各樣的武器和強化裝備,粉碎一擊「西格瑪」的野心

◆威力加強部份
1.【對應Retina顯示!!】
「洛克人X」讓人懷念的畫面將忠實原味地呈現。

2.【2種畫面模式!!】
除了遊戲原作畫面全部的「REGULAR(通常)模式」顯示之外另外追加,
在iPhone螢幕上(裡)提供以全面顯示的「FULL(全屏幕)模式」搭載。

3.【三种游戏难度！ 】
“故事模式”有简单、普通、困难这3种难度。
在“简单”难度中，关卡内的“落脚处”四处可见，能够防止玩家掉落。
如果你对操作有自信，推荐选择需要技巧的“困难”！

4.【 排行榜模式！（Game Center支持功能） 】
提供了可以与其他玩家争夺排行榜排名的“ 排行榜模式”。
具备按分数排名的“高分模式”、按最快通关排名的“竞时模式”、按通关数量排名的“无限模式”。
多多练习，提高操作技术，争夺更高的排名吧！

5.【80個挑戰!!(支援GameCenter功能)】
「STORY MODE」挑戰序幕關卡,挑戰20個(*1),在完成序幕關卡之後,提供60種的合計80種挑戰項目!
※關於(*1)的內容是不支援GameCenter功能。

6.【帮助你游戏的辅助功能！】
不知道在哪里能获得隐藏的强化装备、或者想尽快强化的时候，即可通过“个性化设置”简单入手！
提供了“全盔甲”、“全武器”等各式各样的辅助功能，能帮助你更顺利地游戏。
使用实惠的“完美套装”，拥有最强装备！还具备“编曲BGM”，能变更游戏原本的BGM！

※辅助功能和“编曲BGM”需要付费购买。

------------

◆操作方法

移動•••••方向鍵按鈕
發射•••攻擊按鈕
跳躍•••跳躍按鈕
武器更換•••右上的武器變更按鈕

快速更換武器•••嘗試著觸摸遊戲畫面的頂部!然而在按著不放的狀態下將手指向左右拖曳(挪動),就能簡單地更換武器裝備!
解除裝甲騎乘…按右上方表示的圖標

------------

A new warrior has entered the ring!

Take control of 32 world warriors and test your mettle against players from around the world. Street Fighter IV: Champion Edition perfects the winning gameplay formula by offering higher resolution graphics, three new characters (Rose, Juri and Elena) wide screen support for newer iOS devices and a host of updates and refinements. Long time Street Fighter fans can jump into the action and have an instant familiarity with the controls. For more casual players Street Fighter IV features numerous settings and tutorials that put you on the path to victory.
• Fight as 32 Street Fighter characters 
• Higher resolution graphics and wide screen support
• Intuitive virtual pad controls allow players to execute full move sets including Unique Attacks, Special Moves, Focus Attacks, Super Combos and Ultra Combos 
• Take your game to the next level with a MFi controller like the Gamevice (MFi controllers do not work in menus, they fully function in multiplayer and single-player gameplay.)
• Battle head-to-head against players from around the world via Wifi
• Single player “arcade” and multiplayer modes.
• Unleash super moves with a tap of the “SP” button.
• Four levels of difficulty.

hk.description:
Thumper是一款節奏暴力遊戲：經典動作、猛烈的速度和野蠻的肉體衝撞。你是一隻太空甲蟲，勇敢闖入虛無空間，對抗巨大的首腦。

藉由特別的便攜版，讓你一手掌握九個史詩級別。

向前邁進，掌握新動作，並在可怕的魔王戰中倖存下來。被衝擊原聲推動，你會感受到每一個破碎的影響。要達到共鳴，你必須征服節奏地獄。

■特點■
·氣密一觸式控制
·肖像和風景皆為流暢的60 FPS
·九個史詩級別
·刺激的魔王戰
·迷幻視覺效果和原創配樂
·PLAY+模式（增加挑戰難度和速度）
·在iPhone X上以全螢幕顯示
·iCloud 同步

■請注意■
無線耳機會造成顯著的音頻延遲。為了獲得最佳體驗，強烈建議使用有線耳機或音響。

mo.description:
《Way of the Hunter》將推出手機端系列首作，太平洋西北地區的壯美景觀隨之鋪陳眼前。

在美國內茲珀斯谷的廣闊開放世界中，體驗最真實的狩獵與探索。在风景如画的自然栖息地中发现栩栩如生的动物，使用各种细节逼真的武器。

《獵人征途》的野生動物外型真實而美麗，且具備符合現實的動物群體行為特徵，提供玩家全面且真實的狩獵體驗，讓人能完全沉浸在遊戲世界。親眼目睹複雜多樣的生態環境產生的變化，周遭環境會因為你的行動而出現變動及反應。瞭解真正的獵人所代表的意義，並充分運用自己的技能來戰勝考驗。

面對人道狩獵的挑戰、搭配引人入勝的故事情節進行遊戲，或是單純地在這富饒的自然環境中自由狩獵。

* 數十種細節精緻的動物物種與真實的行為模式，為你帶來真正身歷其境的狩獵體驗
* 醒目標示動物跡象、血跡分析，以及能夠倒回觀看子彈鏡頭的射擊回顧畫面，這些功能都能讓您像專業獵人一樣狩獵
* 使用獵人感官將重要詳情和資訊醒目標示出來，或者關閉獵人感官，讓遊戲體驗更具挑戰性
* 複雜的戰利品系統，其會根據身體素質與年齡等多項因素產生獨一無二的鹿角和動物頭角
* 細膩又自然的動物動作，以及動物察覺到玩家存在時的真實反應
* 24 小時的日夜循環，再加上風和天氣的變化
* 真實彈道與子彈物理模擬
* 大量槍枝和裝備選擇，其中包含證照管制裝備，例如：Bushnell、Federal、Leupold、Primos、Remington 和 Steyr Arms
* 遊戲內的經營模式讓玩家可以獵取野味之後，將販賣肉品所得的資金用於購買新裝備、狩獵通行證以及戰利品狩獵台上的標本
* 引人入勝的故事情節，訴說著一段關於家族狩獵事業的掙扎糾葛，以及圍繞其間的競爭關係和友誼
* 直觀的相片模式，讓你可以捕捉並分享自己最愛的瞬間
* 使用手柄或觸控控制追蹤獵物
* 優化手機端操控，兼顧舒適與效率

警告：
不支援記憶體小於 4 GB 的裝置！
您需要至少 6 GB 記憶體的裝置才能使用最高圖形設定。

© www.handy-games.com GmbH

mo.description:
您是否對相同的舊小說感到厭倦？您是否對交互式故事遊戲、視覺小說、聊天類社交遊戲和獨立遊戲感興趣，但是您已經厭倦了相同的舊遊戲？如果是這樣，您應該查看《七天》，一部視覺小說、決策性的神秘遊戲。

《七天》是一部了不起的神秘視覺小說故事類遊戲。這是一個獨特、決策類的講故事遊戲，而用戶可以根據自己的選擇創建自己的獨特故事。

通過聊天風格的視覺小說類游戲，我們將提供最佳的故事遊戲體驗和豐富的神秘故事情節，專門適用於移動設備。這是一款給您強烈推薦的遊戲。


■ 詳細講解遊戲
您做出的每一個選擇都會改變您的故事。
每個小小的選擇都會改變您與同志們的關係，
並在關鍵時刻改變您和同志們的命運。

您可以是反派，或一位可信賴的同志。
一切都取決於您的選擇。

■ 概要
有的死靈在死亡世界中經受了復活的考驗。
死亡使者給他們分配了一項任務，而他們必須互相攻擊或共同合作。您的角色，基雷爾也必須完成分配給她的選擇性任務。
但是她的任務需要其他人去死......

您只有七天
您會做出什麼樣的選擇？

立即體驗這個發人深省的故事。

■ 遊戲特色
- 圖形新穎的小說類藝術品，具有驚人的圖形
- 在生與死之間切換的獨特遊戲設置
- 根據您的選擇而變化的故事情節
- 各種成就和隱藏的挑戰
- 根據故事的不同情節和結局
- 具有神秘感的文字冒險
- 精彩的講故事遊戲

■ 推薦給那些誰：
- 對文字 / 互動內容感興趣，例如視覺小說、故事遊戲、聊天遊戲和社交遊戲
-對獨特的獨立遊戲充滿熱情，例如《傳說之下》
- 正在尋找帶有神秘和 / 或恐怖元素的講故事遊戲
- 正在尋找終極遊戲，因為他們厭倦了平常的故事類遊戲
- 對其他類型的冒險遊戲感興趣
- 我們還推薦《黑暗界辦公室：鬼怪遊戲》，這是我們的又一款出色的遊戲。

■ 我們保證它會很有趣。立即下載並體驗

如果您發現任何問題或有好的建議，請將它們發送至help@buffstudio.com。我們將努力製作出更好的視覺小說、故事、療愈、獨立，講故事、冒險類遊戲。

■ 我們需要您的支持，以製作更好的故事遊類戲。請將此故事遊戲推薦給您的家人和朋友。這將對我們有很大的幫助。

mo.description:
《身為警察》（This Is the Police）是一個策略/冒險遊戲，故事背景設定在一個螺旋式圍繞排水系統的城市。在遊戲中你將擔任堅韌不拔的警察局長傑克·博伊德的角色，你將潛入一個關於犯罪和陰謀的深刻故事。傑克會不會拿到一大筆錢安心地退休，亦或是最終會破產...還是更糟？

 - 你的任務很明確：在傑克·博伊德退休之前的180天內賺到50萬美元。怎麼賺？一切由你決定！

 - 決定，決定！《身為警察》（This Is the Police）的故事核心是一個黑暗的故事，以及你該如何破解它。無論你決定什麼，你的選擇都會影響比賽 - 以及傑克博伊德的命運。

- 《黃昏三鏢客》？弗里堡警察局局長能夠應付各種人。遊戲全看你的本事，找到壞人並決定如何處理他們。

 - 履行你的職責。作為弗里堡警察局的負責人，傑克每天都要處理各種各樣的挑戰：應對緊急情況，管理他的警員，保衛部門對抗市政廳和腐敗的市長等等。

 - 執行調查並收集針對弗里堡犯罪團伙的證據。

 - 處理城市中的競爭力量。每個人都可向你提供服務，但每一個都是有代價的。

 - 豐富而完整的配音故事：由《毀滅公爵》的配音演員Jon St. John為傑克·博伊德配音。

以《洛克人 X》系列為主軸，展現新世界觀「if」的《ROCKMAN X DiVE》將以離線版重新登場！

某天在深層記錄檔的世界中突然發生了原因不明的錯誤，導致「洛克人X」的遊戲資料發生異常。

移植動作遊戲經典名作「洛克人X」,按照原作添加新要素
充分利用各式各樣的武器和強化裝備,粉碎一擊「西格瑪」的野心

◆威力加強部份
1.【對應Retina顯示!!】
「洛克人X」讓人懷念的畫面將忠實原味地呈現。

2.【2種畫面模式!!】
除了遊戲原作畫面全部的「REGULAR(通常)模式」顯示之外另外追加,
在iPhone螢幕上(裡)提供以全面顯示的「FULL(全屏幕)模式」搭載。

3.【三种游戏难度！ 】
“故事模式”有简单、普通、困难这3种难度。
在“简单”难度中，关卡内的“落脚处”四处可见，能够防止玩家掉落。
如果你对操作有自信，推荐选择需要技巧的“困难”！

mo.description:
Transform Your iPhone into a Professional Long Exposure Camera with Even Longer

Unleash your creativity and capture stunning long exposure photos right from your iPhone with Even Longer. Whether you’re a professional photographer or an enthusiastic amateur, this app offers four incredible capture modes to elevate your photography:

Capture Modes:

	•	Frame Averaging Mode: Create beautiful motion blur with ease.
	•	Light Trails Mode: Perfect for capturing dynamic light movements.
	•	Star Trails Mode: Achieve unmatched quality in star trails photography with advanced algorithms that reduce disturbances like airplanes.
	•	Night Mode (PRO members only): Experience shutter speeds up to 30 times longer than any other third-party camera app, reaching up to 30 seconds (or 10 seconds on older devices).

Go PRO for Even More Features:

Unlock the full potential of Even Longer with our optional PRO membership, which includes:
	•	RAW Support: Available for all modes (except some ultra-wide cameras).
	•	Intervalometer: Capture time-lapse sequences with precision.
	•	Parallel Bracketing: Achieve perfect long exposures with multiple shots.
	•	Save Interim Results: Choose the best shot from multiple captures.
	•	Lossless TIFF Support: Preserve the highest quality in your photos.
	•	Exclusive Night Mode: Push the limits of your night photography.

Even Longer allows for a total capture time of up to 24 hours, giving you the flexibility to capture every moment, from seconds to hours. For the best results, use a tripod to ensure your long exposure images are sharp and stunning. If you’re exploring intentional camera movement (ICM) photography, you can experiment without a tripod for creative effects.

Get Started Today:
Transform your iPhone into a powerful long exposure camera and elevate your photography with Even Longer. Set your capture time from 1 second to several hours and see the difference.

Download Even Longer now and start capturing the world in a whole new light!

mo.description:
歡迎使用 AMood，你的 Apple Watch 上健康生活好夥伴。無感追蹤你的心理狀態和身體壓力，快捷查看睡眠、基礎代謝、飲水、咖啡因攝入等健康指標，幫助你掌握身體動態，探索更美好的健康生活。

◎ AMood如何幫助到你

在這個快節奏的時代，我們常常像陀螺一樣不停旋轉，卻忽視了傾聽內心的聲音。疲憊與焦慮悄然襲來，卻難以言說原因。我們相信，了解身心狀態是每個人找到理想生活節奏的關鍵。AMood 正是秉持這一理念，透過更精準的分析，幫助你更好地照顧自己。例如：

- 當你忙於趕專案，連續工作數小時，軟體會透過手錶提醒你身體活力下降，泡杯熱茶，活動一下身體；

- 當你開完一整天的會議，感到焦慮不安時，軟體同樣會提醒你情緒指數偏低，讓你意識到需要暫時停下來，也許走出去曬曬太陽，散散步，都是不錯的選擇；

- 早晨醒來感到鬱悶，打開軟體發現情緒指數偏低，原來昨晚的睡眠品質不佳。今天可能需要多曬曬太陽或者中午小睡一會，讓身心重新煥發光彩；

- 查看本週趨勢，發現每次與好友一起運動後，情緒指數都會明顯上揚。這或許是生活給我們的一個小提示：快樂往往藏在簡單的事物中；

- 當工作壓力大時，查看身心狀態日曆，尋找最適合自己的黃金時段。在對的時間做對的事，讓效率與健康齊頭並進。

◎ 核心功能

過去，壓力常透過單一的 HRV 指標衡量，但生活遠比數字複雜。AMood 首創雙維度分析，獨立監測身體壓力和心理狀態，幫助您更精準地識別身心變化，找到最適合的調節方式。

- 雙維監測：獨立追蹤身體活力與情緒波動，提供更精準的分析

- 全域數據：整合睡眠、心率、體溫、日照、步態等資訊，全面了解身體狀態

- 智慧提醒：即時監測身心狀態變化，適時提醒休息與調整

- 趨勢洞察：幫助您發現最佳作息與工作節奏

- 習慣養成：記錄運動、飲水、咖啡因攝入等行為，助力健康管理

- 聯名主題：多個 IP 正版授權，增添健康管理的樂趣與互動

AMood 不僅關注單一時刻，更致力於發現生活中的規律。透過分析睡眠、心率、體溫等多維數據，描繪出你獨特的生命韻律。每一組數據背後，都蘊藏著提升生活品質的秘密。因為我們深信，照顧自己這段旅程，理應充滿溫暖與愉悅。

◎ 蘋果健康整合

AMood 與 Apple Health 整合，需要授予蘋果健康的讀取和寫入權限。

◎ 訂閱價格和條款

我們提供一次性購買、按月和按年自動續訂三種不同的購買選項。按月或按年訂閱的說明：確認並支付後，將透過你的蘋果 iTunes 帳號自動續訂。扣費成功後，順延一個訂閱週期。若需退訂，請在當前訂閱期結束前至少24小時內，手動在 iTunes / Apple ID 設定管理中關閉自動續費功能。試用期內，如不取消訂閱，則會在試用期結束時自動開通訂閱並扣款。本服務由您自助選擇是否取消，若您選擇不取消，將為您開通下一個計費週期的續費服務。

◎ 隱私保護

使用者健康數據僅儲存在本地以及使用者所屬的 iCloud 中。

◎ 免責聲明

AMood 不是醫療設備，不能用於診斷、治療、預防疾病或醫療狀況，所提供的所有資訊和建議不可以被視作醫療建議或診斷，請勿替代專業的診斷和治療。因此，如果您擔心自己的身體和（或）心理健康，請諮詢醫生。

◎ 使用者協議和隱私條款

使用者協議 https://docs.amood.app/terms-of-use
隱私條款 https://docs.amood.app/privacy-policy

mo.description:
在台湾和日本鐵路線上駕駛電車並載客。

・簡單的益智遊戲
“東京電車２”是一款規則簡單的益智遊戲。無需專業知識。
火車迷，遊戲迷，人人都能享受。

・致所有將成為行動調度員的人
在日本的早晨，顧客們正在等待火車的到來去上班。
讓我們啟動火車並運送客戶。

- 遊戲目標
日本鐵路公司是營利性組織。讓我們以高營業利潤為目標吧！

・如何產生利潤
票價收入-出發成本=營業利潤。

票價收入是在車站的顧客登上火車時產生的。
示例）如果兩名乘客在票價為 20 的車站上車，他們將獲得 40。

發車費按發車時的車廂數收取。
示例）2 節車廂的火車為 30，4 節車廂的火車為 40，10 節車廂的火車為 70。


一個人可以乘坐一輛車。
票價收入是在乘客登上火車時產生的。
調整行駛距離和車輛數量以獲得最大利潤。
離境費用。如果你開的火車太多，而佔用率下降，你就會損失收入。

·操作方法
控制非常簡單，規則也很簡單。
你所要做的就是調整列車的車廂數量，讓列車在最佳時間出發。
隨著遊戲的進行，將會出現各種變化，例如特快列車和換乘站。

·體積
享受 50 多條路線。
請體驗日本鐵路公司的各種運輸策略。

- 沒有廣告，沒有計費
沒有應用內購買。無廣告。
請專心玩遊戲。孩子們可以安心地玩耍。
讓我們分享在 社交媒體 上駕駛的結果。

・鐵路玩
JR東日本、JR東海、JR西日本、JR九州、東武、東急、西武、京王、京急、京阪、阪急、阪神、近鐵、名鐵、小田急、南海、西鐵、相鐵、京成、東京地鐵、大阪地鐵、都營地鐵, 筑波快遞

・容量約130MB
存儲負擔也小。根本沒有繁重的處理。

tw.description:
《Way of the Hunter》將推出手機端系列首作，太平洋西北地區的壯美景觀隨之鋪陳眼前。

在美國內茲珀斯谷的廣闊開放世界中，體驗最真實的狩獵與探索。在风景如画的自然栖息地中发现栩栩如生的动物，使用各种细节逼真的武器。

《獵人征途》的野生動物外型真實而美麗，且具備符合現實的動物群體行為特徵，提供玩家全面且真實的狩獵體驗，讓人能完全沉浸在遊戲世界。親眼目睹複雜多樣的生態環境產生的變化，周遭環境會因為你的行動而出現變動及反應。瞭解真正的獵人所代表的意義，並充分運用自己的技能來戰勝考驗。

面對人道狩獵的挑戰、搭配引人入勝的故事情節進行遊戲，或是單純地在這富饒的自然環境中自由狩獵。

* 數十種細節精緻的動物物種與真實的行為模式，為你帶來真正身歷其境的狩獵體驗
* 醒目標示動物跡象、血跡分析，以及能夠倒回觀看子彈鏡頭的射擊回顧畫面，這些功能都能讓您像專業獵人一樣狩獵
* 使用獵人感官將重要詳情和資訊醒目標示出來，或者關閉獵人感官，讓遊戲體驗更具挑戰性
* 複雜的戰利品系統，其會根據身體素質與年齡等多項因素產生獨一無二的鹿角和動物頭角
* 細膩又自然的動物動作，以及動物察覺到玩家存在時的真實反應
* 24 小時的日夜循環，再加上風和天氣的變化
* 真實彈道與子彈物理模擬
* 大量槍枝和裝備選擇，其中包含證照管制裝備，例如：Bushnell、Federal、Leupold、Primos、Remington 和 Steyr Arms
* 遊戲內的經營模式讓玩家可以獵取野味之後，將販賣肉品所得的資金用於購買新裝備、狩獵通行證以及戰利品狩獵台上的標本
* 引人入勝的故事情節，訴說著一段關於家族狩獵事業的掙扎糾葛，以及圍繞其間的競爭關係和友誼
* 直觀的相片模式，讓你可以捕捉並分享自己最愛的瞬間
* 使用手柄或觸控控制追蹤獵物
* 優化手機端操控，兼顧舒適與效率

tw.description:
您是否對相同的舊小說感到厭倦？您是否對交互式故事遊戲、視覺小說、聊天類社交遊戲和獨立遊戲感興趣，但是您已經厭倦了相同的舊遊戲？如果是這樣，您應該查看《七天》，一部視覺小說、決策性的神秘遊戲。

《七天》是一部了不起的神秘視覺小說故事類遊戲。這是一個獨特、決策類的講故事遊戲，而用戶可以根據自己的選擇創建自己的獨特故事。

通過聊天風格的視覺小說類游戲，我們將提供最佳的故事遊戲體驗和豐富的神秘故事情節，專門適用於移動設備。這是一款給您強烈推薦的遊戲。


■ 詳細講解遊戲
您做出的每一個選擇都會改變您的故事。
每個小小的選擇都會改變您與同志們的關係，
並在關鍵時刻改變您和同志們的命運。

您可以是反派，或一位可信賴的同志。
一切都取決於您的選擇。

■ 概要
有的死靈在死亡世界中經受了復活的考驗。
死亡使者給他們分配了一項任務，而他們必須互相攻擊或共同合作。您的角色，基雷爾也必須完成分配給她的選擇性任務。
但是她的任務需要其他人去死......

您只有七天
您會做出什麼樣的選擇？

立即體驗這個發人深省的故事。

■ 遊戲特色
- 圖形新穎的小說類藝術品，具有驚人的圖形
- 在生與死之間切換的獨特遊戲設置
- 根據您的選擇而變化的故事情節
- 各種成就和隱藏的挑戰
- 根據故事的不同情節和結局
- 具有神秘感的文字冒險
- 精彩的講故事遊戲

■ 推薦給那些誰：
- 對文字 / 互動內容感興趣，例如視覺小說、故事遊戲、聊天遊戲和社交遊戲
-對獨特的獨立遊戲充滿熱情，例如《傳說之下》
- 正在尋找帶有神秘和 / 或恐怖元素的講故事遊戲
- 正在尋找終極遊戲，因為他們厭倦了平常的故事類遊戲
- 對其他類型的冒險遊戲感興趣
- 我們還推薦《黑暗界辦公室：鬼怪遊戲》，這是我們的又一款出色的遊戲。

■ 我們保證它會很有趣。立即下載並體驗

如果您發現任何問題或有好的建議，請將它們發送至help@buffstudio.com。我們將努力製作出更好的視覺小說、故事、療愈、獨立，講故事、冒險類遊戲。

■ 我們需要您的支持，以製作更好的故事遊類戲。請將此故事遊戲推薦給您的家人和朋友。這將對我們有很大的幫助。

《身為警察》（This Is the Police）是一個策略/冒險遊戲，故事背景設定在一個螺旋式圍繞排水系統的城市。在遊戲中你將擔任堅韌不拔的警察局長傑克·博伊德的角色，你將潛入一個關於犯罪和陰謀的深刻故事。傑克會不會拿到一大筆錢安心地退休，亦或是最終會破產...還是更糟？

 - 你的任務很明確：在傑克·博伊德退休之前的180天內賺到50萬美元。怎麼賺？一切由你決定！

 - 決定，決定！《身為警察》（This Is the Police）的故事核心是一個黑暗的故事，以及你該如何破解它。無論你決定什麼，你的選擇都會影響比賽 - 以及傑克博伊德的命運。

- 《黃昏三鏢客》？弗里堡警察局局長能夠應付各種人。遊戲全看你的本事，找到壞人並決定如何處理他們。

 - 履行你的職責。作為弗里堡警察局的負責人，傑克每天都要處理各種各樣的挑戰：應對緊急情況，管理他的警員，保衛部門對抗市政廳和腐敗的市長等等。

 - 執行調查並收集針對弗里堡犯罪團伙的證據。

 - 處理城市中的競爭力量。每個人都可向你提供服務，但每一個都是有代價的。

 - 豐富而完整的配音故事：由《毀滅公爵》的配音演員Jon St. John為傑克·博伊德配音。

Mega Man X DiVE reimagined the world of the Mega Man X series, and now it's getting an offline version!
Experience the exciting side-scrolling action we've all come to know and love in a whole new light!

Enter Deep Log, a digital world where the game data of the Mega Man X series has been archived. Due to a bug of unknown origins, the game data within Deep Log has become fragmented. With the help of a mysterious navigator, RiCO, the player dives into this digital world to set things straight.
Take control of Hunter Programs, recreations of legendary characters such as X and Zero, defeat various forms of Irregular Data, and restore the fractured game data!

In addition, this game features 360 degree aiming and an auto-lock function!
You can also scale and position the touchscreen controls to match your own unique playstyle.

Acquire your favorite characters from across the Mega Man universe to add to your collection, and level them up to make them stronger!

us.description:
Dispatch Japanese trains!

・Simple brain game
"Train Dispatcher!2" is a brain game with simple rules. No expertise required.
Train fans, game fans, everyone can enjoy it.

・To everyone who will become a train dispatcher
In the morning in Japan, customers are waiting for the arrival of the train to go to work.
Let's start the train and transport the customers.

・Goal of the game
Japanese railway companies are for-profit organizations. Let's aim for high operating profit!

・How to make profit
Fare revenue - Departure cost = Operating profit.

Fare revenue is generated when passengers board at a station.
Example) If two passengers board a train at a station with a fare of 20, the company receives 40.

Departure costs are charged according to the number of cars when the train departs.
Example) 30 for a 2-car train, 40 for a 4-car train, and 70 for a 10-car train.

One person can ride in one car.
Fare revenue is generated when customers board the train.
Adjust the driving schedule and the number of vehicles to aim for the highest profit.
Departure costs. If you run too many trains and the occupancy rate drops, you'll lose revenue.

・How to operate
The game is very easy to operate and the rules are simple.
All you have to do is adjust the number of train cars and make the trains depart at the best time.
As the game progresses, various variations such as express trains and transfer stations will appear.

・Volume
Enjoy over 50 routes.
Please experience the wide variety of transportation strategies of Japanese railway companies.
No ads, no charges.

・No ads, no billing
Please concentrate on the game. Children can also enjoy the game.
Share your results on Social Media.

JR East Japan JR Tokai JR West Japan JR Kyushu Tobu Tokyu Seibu Keio Keikyu Keihan Hankyu Hanshin Kintetsu Meitetsu Odakyu Nankai Seitetsu Sotetsu Keisei Tokyo Metro Osaka Metro Toei Subway Tsukuba Express

tr.description:
Genius Scan is a document scanner app in your pocket. Quickly scan your paper documents on the go and export them as multi-page PDF files.

*** Apple App of the Week *** 20+ million users *** 1000s of small businesses ***

Place any document in front of your device’s camera: our scanner app automatically recognizes the paper against the background, crops it, and cleans up the result. You obtain a crisp, legible scan. Batch scanning lets you scan dozens of pages in a matter of seconds. Powerful tools help you organize, share, or archive your documents.

“Next time you plan to hit the road, don’t forget to download Genius Scan to make life easier for yourself and your accounting department.” - AppPicker.com

“Camera apps aren’t designed for close-up text scanning, but Genius Scan is.” - The Guardian

== ENTERPRISE EDITION ==

Genius Scan Plus Premium Plan:

- All the premium features of the Genius Scan Plus Premium Plan (denoted with + below), out of the box (no upgrade needed).

Managed Configuration:

- Deployment to fleets of devices managed by a MDM tool
- Pre-configuration of app settings on a per-user basis (eg. set default email address, WebDAV/FTP credentials)
- Control of which apps and services users can export documents to
- No ads

== KEY FEATURES == 

Smart Scanning:

- Document detection & background removal
- Distortion correction
- Shadow removal and defect cleanup
- Filters (black & white, whiteboard, photo)
- Batch scanning

PDF Creation & Editing:

- Document merging & splitting
- Multiple page PDF creation
- Photos and PDF import

Security & Privacy:

- On-device document processing
+ Face ID locking
+ PDF password encryption

Document Organization:

- Document tagging
- Metadata and content search
+ Smart document renaming (custom templates, …)
+ Backup and multi-device sync with Genius Cloud (separate subscription)

Export:

- Email
+ Box, Dropbox, Evernote, Expensify, Google Drive, iCloud Drive, OneDrive, OneNote, FTP, SugarSync, WebDAV.
+ Any WebDAV compatible service such as Citrix ShareFile, NextCloud, ownCloud, Synology, Yandex. 
+ Automatic background auto-export

OCR (Text Recognition):

+ Text extraction
+ Searchable PDF creation
+ Business card scanning & contact creation

== ABOUT US ==

It’s in the heart of Paris, France that The Grizzly Labs develops Genius Scan. We take pride in crafting apps that help millions of users throughout the world and hold ourselves to the highest standards in terms of quality and privacy. Get in touch with us @thegrizzlylabs if you have any questions.

== PRICING & LEGAL ==

You can subscribe to Genius Cloud for backup & synchronization. In that case, Genius Scan’s store displays the duration and price of each subscription, updated at the time of purchase. Payment will be charged to iTunes account when the order is confirmed. Subscriptions automatically renew unless auto-renew is turned off no later than 24 hours before the end of the current period. Manage subscriptions, disable auto-renewal in the iTunes account settings.

https://www.thegrizzlylabs.com/genius-scan/cloud/terms

--- Game Introduction ---

Mega Man X DiVE reimagined the world of the Mega Man X series, and now it's getting an offline version!
Experience the exciting side-scrolling action we've all come to know and love in a whole new light!

Enter Deep Log, a digital world where the game data of the Mega Man X series has been archived. Due to a bug of unknown origins, the game data within Deep Log has become fragmented. With the help of a mysterious navigator, RiCO, the player dives into this digital world to set things straight.
Take control of Hunter Programs, recreations of legendary characters such as X and Zero, defeat various forms of Irregular Data, and restore the fractured game data!

- Classic Mega Man Action
Jump, dash, fire your buster, and swing your saber. All the actions you'd expect from the Mega Man X series are here!
In addition, this game features 360 degree aiming and an auto-lock function!
You can also scale and position the touchscreen controls to match your own unique playstyle.

- Featuring over 100 Characters from the Mega Man Series
Acquire your favorite characters from across the Mega Man universe to add to your collection, and level them up to make them stronger!
With a mix of brand-new original characters and new designs for fan-favorites, there are plenty out there to discover!

- An All-New Original Story with Hundreds of Stages to Enjoy
Immerse yourself in a new Mega Man tale that can only be experienced in Mega Man X DiVE. Blast and cut your way through hundreds of stages spanning multiple difficulty levels!

- Make Your Characters Stronger with Weapons, Chips, and Cards
Characters can equip all types of weapons to become stronger.

tr.description:
Transform Your iPhone into a Professional Long Exposure Camera with Even Longer

Unleash your creativity and capture stunning long exposure photos right from your iPhone with Even Longer. Whether you’re a professional photographer or an enthusiastic amateur, this app offers four incredible capture modes to elevate your photography:

Capture Modes:

	•	Frame Averaging Mode: Create beautiful motion blur with ease.
	•	Light Trails Mode: Perfect for capturing dynamic light movements.
	•	Star Trails Mode: Achieve unmatched quality in star trails photography with advanced algorithms that reduce disturbances like airplanes.
	•	Night Mode (PRO members only): Experience shutter speeds up to 30 times longer than any other third-party camera app, reaching up to 30 seconds (or 10 seconds on older devices).

Go PRO for Even More Features:

Unlock the full potential of Even Longer with our optional PRO membership, which includes:
	•	RAW Support: Available for all modes (except some ultra-wide cameras).
	•	Intervalometer: Capture time-lapse sequences with precision.
	•	Parallel Bracketing: Achieve perfect long exposures with multiple shots.
	•	Save Interim Results: Choose the best shot from multiple captures.
	•	Lossless TIFF Support: Preserve the highest quality in your photos.
	•	Exclusive Night Mode: Push the limits of your night photography.

Even Longer allows for a total capture time of up to 24 hours, giving you the flexibility to capture every moment, from seconds to hours. For the best results, use a tripod to ensure your long exposure images are sharp and stunning. If you’re exploring intentional camera movement (ICM) photography, you can experiment without a tripod for creative effects.

Get Started Today:
Transform your iPhone into a powerful long exposure camera and elevate your photography with Even Longer. Set your capture time from 1 second to several hours and see the difference.

Download Even Longer now and start capturing the world in a whole new light!

tr.description:
Dispatch Japanese trains!

・Simple brain game
"Train Dispatcher!2" is a brain game with simple rules. No expertise required.
Train fans, game fans, everyone can enjoy it.

・To everyone who will become a train dispatcher
In the morning in Japan, customers are waiting for the arrival of the train to go to work.
Let's start the train and transport the customers.

・Goal of the game
Japanese railway companies are for-profit organizations. Let's aim for high operating profit!

・How to make profit
Fare revenue - Departure cost = Operating profit.

Fare revenue is generated when passengers board at a station.
Example) If two passengers board a train at a station with a fare of 20, the company receives 40.

Departure costs are charged according to the number of cars when the train departs.
Example) 30 for a 2-car train, 40 for a 4-car train, and 70 for a 10-car train.

One person can ride in one car.
Fare revenue is generated when customers board the train.
Adjust the driving schedule and the number of vehicles to aim for the highest profit.
Departure costs. If you run too many trains and the occupancy rate drops, you'll lose revenue.

・How to operate
The game is very easy to operate and the rules are simple.
All you have to do is adjust the number of train cars and make the trains depart at the best time.
As the game progresses, various variations such as express trains and transfer stations will appear.

・Volume
Enjoy over 50 routes.
Please experience the wide variety of transportation strategies of Japanese railway companies.
No ads, no charges.

・No ads, no billing
Please concentrate on the game. Children can also enjoy the game.
Share your results on Social Media.

・Train lines you can play with
JR East Japan JR Tokai JR West Japan JR Kyushu Tobu Tokyu Seibu Keio Keikyu Keihan Hankyu Hanshin Kintetsu Meitetsu Odakyu Nankai Seitetsu Sotetsu Keisei Tokyo Metro Osaka Metro Toei Subway Tsukuba Express

・Capacity is about 130MB
The storage burden is also small. There is no heavy processing at all.

Verifique os avisos "Sobre compras" e "Dispositivos compatíveis" abaixo antes de comprar ou usar o aplicativo.

--- Introdução ao jogo ---

Mega Man X DiVE reimaginou o mundo da série Mega Man X e agora está ganhando uma versão offline!
Experimente a emocionante ação de rolagem lateral que todos conhecemos e amamos sob uma luz totalmente nova!

Entre no Registro Profundo, um mundo digital onde os dados do jogo da série Mega Man X foram arquivados. Devido a um bug de origem desconhecida, os dados do jogo no Registro Profundo ficaram fragmentados. Com a ajuda de RiCO, um navegador misterioso, o jogador mergulha neste mundo digital para acertar as coisas.
Assuma o controle dos Programas Caçadores, recriações de personagens lendários como X e Zero, derrote várias formas de Dados Irregulares e restaure os dados do jogo fraturados!

- Ação Clássica do Mega Man
Salte, corra, dispare seu buster e branda seu sabre. Todas as ações que você esperaria da série Mega Man X estão aqui!
Além disso, este jogo apresenta mira de 360 graus e uma função de bloqueio automático!
Você também pode dimensionar e posicionar os controles da tela táctil para adequá-la ao seu estilo de jogo particular.

- Apresentando mais de 100 personagens da série Mega Man
Adquira seus personagens favoritos de todo o universo Mega Man para adicionar à sua coleção e aumente seu nível para que sejam mais fortes!
Com uma mistura de novos personagens originais e novos designs para os favoritos dos fãs, há muito para descobrir!

- Uma história original totalmente nova com centenas de estágios para desfrutar
Mergulhe em uma nova história de de Mega Man que só pode ser experimentada em Mega Man X DiVE. Exploda e abra seu caminho através de centenas de estágios abrangendo vários níveis de dificuldade!

- Faça que seus personagens fiquem mais fortes com armas, chips e cartas
Os personagens podem equipar todos os tipos de armas para se tornarem mais fortes.
Aprimore a classificação de uma arma para aumentar seu poder e desbloquear novas habilidades.

pt.description:
Transform Your iPhone into a Professional Long Exposure Camera with Even Longer

Unleash your creativity and capture stunning long exposure photos right from your iPhone with Even Longer. Whether you’re a professional photographer or an enthusiastic amateur, this app offers four incredible capture modes to elevate your photography:

Capture Modes:

	•	Frame Averaging Mode: Create beautiful motion blur with ease.
	•	Light Trails Mode: Perfect for capturing dynamic light movements.
	•	Star Trails Mode: Achieve unmatched quality in star trails photography with advanced algorithms that reduce disturbances like airplanes.
	•	Night Mode (PRO members only): Experience shutter speeds up to 30 times longer than any other third-party camera app, reaching up to 30 seconds (or 10 seconds on older devices).

Go PRO for Even More Features:

Unlock the full potential of Even Longer with our optional PRO membership, which includes:
	•	RAW Support: Available for all modes (except some ultra-wide cameras).
	•	Intervalometer: Capture time-lapse sequences with precision.
	•	Parallel Bracketing: Achieve perfect long exposures with multiple shots.
	•	Save Interim Results: Choose the best shot from multiple captures.
	•	Lossless TIFF Support: Preserve the highest quality in your photos.
	•	Exclusive Night Mode: Push the limits of your night photography.

Even Longer allows for a total capture time of up to 24 hours, giving you the flexibility to capture every moment, from seconds to hours. For the best results, use a tripod to ensure your long exposure images are sharp and stunning. If you’re exploring intentional camera movement (ICM) photography, you can experiment without a tripod for creative effects.

Get Started Today:
Transform your iPhone into a powerful long exposure camera and elevate your photography with Even Longer. Set your capture time from 1 second to several hours and see the difference.

Download Even Longer now and start capturing the world in a whole new light!

Thumper é violência musical: ação clássica, velocidade alucinante e fisicalidade brutal. Você é um besouro espacial que deve desbravar o vazio e enfrentar uma cabeça gigante desvairada.

Fones sem fio podem causar uma latência perceptível no áudio. Para a melhor experiência, recomendamos enfaticamente o uso de alto-falantes integrados ou fones com fio.

pt.description:
RadarScope is an AMS-award-winning weather visualization tool that empowers meteorologists, public safety officials, storm spotters, and weather enthusiasts to view a full suite of single-site radar data and related severe weather products. Your initial purchase provides professional radar visualization in a fully native app, free from distracting and invasive practices, with optional subscription packages to add even more capabilities.

Whether you’re scanning for a mesocyclone’s tell-tale hook echo, pinpointing the landfall of a hurricane’s eye wall, or identifying velocity couplet, hail spike, or debris ball signatures, RadarScope displays native radar data in its original radial format. You see what the radar sees almost as soon as the radar sees it, with automatic updates every two to ten minutes depending on the radar’s scanning strategy.

Your initial app purchase includes the following:

• Full suite of single-site radar products for the US, Canada, Guam, Denmark, Finland, and Germany
• 6-frame radar loops
• Two built-in providers for radar data
• Tornado, thunderstorm, flash flood, marine, snow squall, extreme wind, tropical, and other warnings in the US
• Selected severe weather warnings in Canada and Australia
• NWS-generated storm tracks with hail, TVS, and mesocyclone attributes
• Inspector and distance tools
• Color palette options for radar data
• AllisonHouse data plan integration
• Spotter Network integration for storm and location reporting
• mPING integration for submitting weather reports to NSSL
• Bundled maps with political boundaries, water bodies, and major highways, optimized for low-bandwidth use
• Support for widgets and complications
• Universal app for Apple platforms, including Apple Watch and Apple TV
• Family Sharing support

RadarScope Pro Tier One is an optional annual subscription that adds more features for tracking severe weather:

• 30-frame radar loops
• Cloud-to-ground lightning strikes
• Severe weather watches in the US and Canada
• Special weather statements in the US and Canada
• Mesoscale convective and precipitation discussions
• SPC convective, tornado, hail, wind, and fire outlooks
• WPC excessive rainfall outlooks in the US
• Local storm reports in the US
• Custom color palette support
• Multi-pane display (2 on phones; 4 on larger devices)
• Family Sharing support

RadarScope Pro Tier Two is an optional annual or monthly subscription that transforms RadarScope into a more complete visualization tool for a larger suite of weather products, including:

• Everything in Pro Tier One
• 50-frame radar loops
• A third provider for US radar data
• NEXRAD Level II radar data for the US with a 30-year historical archive
• Historical NEXRAD Level III, super-res, and non-US radar data with a 30-day archive
• Historical NWS bulletins with a 19-year archive
• GOES East and GOES West satellite products
• NSSL’s Multi-Radar Multi-Sensor (MRMS) products
• NCEP’s Real-Time Mesoscale Assimilation (RTMA) products
• Surface observations
• Atmospheric soundings in the US
• Hail size, hail probability, and azimuthal shear contours with a 30-day archive
• More detailed transportation and satellite imagery maps
• Custom color palette support for GOES, MRMS, and RTMA
• Server-sent events for radar and warning updates
• Cross-platform subscription sharing on up to 5 devices
• Family sharing support

If you choose to buy a RadarScope Pro subscription, it will be charged to your App Store account. The subscription will be auto-renewed within 24 hours prior to the end of the current period at the same price you originally paid. Subscriptions may be managed and auto-renewal disabled via your App Store account settings after the purchase. Once purchased, the subscription cannot be canceled during the active subscription period.

DTN is committed to safeguarding your privacy online. Our privacy policy is available for review at https://www.dtn.com/privacy-policy/

Please visit our web site for more information.
